title: lichen_iface set-once invariant enforced only by comment not by code
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:201 (lichen_iface declaration) and line 603 (assignment)

Risk: The comment at line 197-200 states INVARIANT: Set once, never cleared. However:
1. Nothing prevents a second call to lichen_l2_iface_init() from overwriting it
2. The fail_late_init path at line 622-636 explicitly does NOT clear it per the invariant, but a future contributor might not understand why
3. If NET_DEVICE_INIT were called twice (unlikely but possible in some Zephyr configs), this would silently overwrite

Pattern contributors may misunderstand: Thinking they can reset the interface by calling init again, or not understanding why fail_late_init does not clear lichen_iface.

Suggested fix: Add a check at the start of lichen_l2_iface_init(): 
  if (lichen_iface != NULL) { LOG_ERR(...); return; }

Or use a static bool already_initialized flag that triggers a BUILD_ASSERT-like runtime panic on second call.
close_reason: Fixed: Added runtime check to enforce lichen_iface set-once invariant
